events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: hot work, no fire watch during and post-work period. NFPA 51B requires fire watch during hot work and for a minimum period after (at least 30 minutes, sometimes more). OSHA 1926 Subpart J (welding and cutting) also requires fire watch. This is non-compliant and a critical fire safety hazard. Decision: fail.
